items.name_cn:
-
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE VANITY Makeup Pouch 👜
This classic makeup bag is inspired by the MAISON CE makeup bag,
It brings new life to the handbag series this season, and the size is just right.
Practical, versatile, and exquisite, the name comes from its CE shape.
CE VANITY is the first season launch, made of natural calfskin, CE's most noble original leather, sturdy texture, and can be shaped into a delicate and distinct structure! Inspired by the Triomphe chain.
The tan leather trim is a CE TRIOMPHE CANVAS feature!
Style No.: 119462
Color: Monogram Brown (with original packaging)
Size: 18x12x18cm

items.name_en: YSL Zipper Wallet with 12 card slots, 1 zip pocket, 2 bill compartments, 2 slip pockets
items.name_cn:
YSL Zipper Wallet with 12 card slots, 1 zip pocket, 2 bill compartments, 2 slip pockets
It has to be said that YSL wallets are really very practical. The classic crocodile grain calfskin paired with large gold hardware is simple yet highlights the brand's design style. It is a piece that stands the test of time and looks great. It can also hold a phone. Durable and wear-resistant, requires no special care.
Model: 358094
Dimensions: 19*10cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: YSL Crocodile Grain Card Holder in stock, ordered for HK$3100. A super practical piece. Small but very spacious, it holds large bills and coins can be placed in the zip pocket! The most thoughtful feature is the ID card slot that is visible. In short, a must-have super practical item for everyone. Calfskin + Sheepskin. Full set of counter packaging.

items.name_en: 💰 Prada Crossbody Zippered Card Holder for Men and Women
items.name_cn:
💰 Prada Crossbody Zippered Card Holder for Men and Women
Model: 1MM268 Size: 10*8cm Original single quality
Color details as shown in the picture, exclusive real shot. Fits inside a bag or can be held by hand.
A small and cute leather good made of cross-grain cowhide.
Classic and practical zippered design, with accordion-style card slots inside for easy organization. Perfect for carrying just your phone in summer or placing inside a small bag. Your best choice for taste.

New Release🆕Chane1 25s Spring/Summer
Cross-handle Mini Kelly Pale Blue
Purchased from the counter for 31,800 RMB~
A viral classic🔥New version Mini Kelly cross-body
When Chanel's legendary aesthetics collide with exquisite craftsmanship,
this Cross-chain Handle Mini Kelly is born
The design is ingenious, offering an elegant handheld feel,
and can also be worn casually across the body to unlock diverse fashion looks~

Material: Impala "Three Sheep" small ball pattern
Size: 10*18*4.5 cm
